label: PASS
rationale: After Activate, the Locking SP is manufactured and Admin1 can authenticate with the copied SID PIN; DeleteSP on ThisSP may succeed and must return an empty list.

label: FAIL
rationale: DeleteSP success/failure is conveyed by status, but the method result itself is specified as an empty list; returning ["unexpected"] is not compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: A successful DeleteSP takes effect when the session is successfully closed; after deletion the host must no longer be able to open sessions to that SP, so StartSession SUCCESS is noncompliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: DeleteSP is allowed while disabled, but once the session closes successfully the SP is deleted and the host must not be able to open a new session to it.

label: FAIL
rationale: DeleteSP deletes the current SP, and the current session is to the Admin SP; the Admin SP shall not be deletable, so a SUCCESS response is not compliant.
